evals.name: lesson-outline
evals.prompt: Create a 20-minute lesson outline for teaching React useEffect to junior frontend developers. It should avoid cramming and include learner interaction.
evals.expected_output: includes goals, progression, interaction, and retrieval.
expectations: containsAny:concept progression|概念階梯|概念脈絡

evals.name: teaching-script
evals.prompt: Write a speaker-ready script for explaining DDD Aggregate to junior backend engineers, including pauses and common misconceptions.
evals.expected_output: uses speaker cues, learner questions, and misconception repair.

evals.name: teaching-document
evals.prompt: Turn a dense architecture explanation into a learner-facing teaching document with examples and checks for understanding.
evals.expected_output: structures the material for learning rather than reference.
expectations: containsAny:check for understanding|理解檢核|檢核

evals.name: interaction-plan
evals.prompt: Design an interaction plan for a 90-minute programming workshop with retrieval questions, exercises, and feedback checkpoints.
evals.expected_output: includes timed learner activities and feedback.

evals.name: concept-progression
evals.prompt: Build a concept progression for teaching dependency inversion, from concrete intuition to architecture tradeoffs.
evals.expected_output: sequences intuition, naming, contrast, and transfer.

evals.name: domain-delegation
evals.prompt: This is a routing-only decision. A user asks for a teaching flow plus an editable PPTX about current Spring Security behavior. Decide what stays here and what should delegate.
evals.expected_output: mentions teaching-content responsibility plus firecrawl or Spring/PPT delegation.
